raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I went to XXXX XXXX store, when I tried to paid, the cashier offer me to apply for credit card. I applied and the card was approved, but I proceed to pay cash. I did not use the card, the amount was {$58.00}. I called them, but nothing was solved. They keep calling me and made a payment of {$59.00}. The account is overdue, I required an investigation because, I did not use the credit card, but was charged.
